title: stenocereus humilis
intro: Stenocereus humilis, also known as the little pickled pincushion or little pickled pear cactus, is a species of cactus native to the deserts of Mexico. The plant is valued for its medicinal properties, which include anti-inflammatory and antiseptic qualities. The health benefits of Stenocereus humilis include reducing pain and inflammation, as well as aiding in the treatment of wounds and skin conditions. Herbal preparations of the plant are often made into teas, tinctures, and salves, which are used topically to soothe and heal various skin irritations.
